title: Infiniti Stealer: a new macOS infostealer using ClickFix and Python/Nuitka

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 - Infiniti Stealer: a new macOS infostealer using ClickFix and
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/29
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*any.run*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
rules.yara:
rule CDB_APEX_Infiniti_Stealer__a_new_macOS_infosteale {
    meta:
        description = "Infiniti Stealer: a new macOS infostealer using ClickFix and"
        author = "CyberDudeBivash"
    strings:
        $h0 = "1e63be724bf651bb17bcf181d11bacfabef6a6360dcdfda945d6389e80f2b958" ascii nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
